text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Wooo! There's nothing like an early morning run!
Getting in some stretches while soaking up the
morning sun—I'm in top form again today! ☆

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Ngh, dammit! I need to kick off the ground harder!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Wait a second... Hey! Hold it! STOP!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
That's it! You're doing great! It's easier to run
now, right? Keep that up. ☆

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It's working! I'm getting further than before!
Um, thank you!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Also... I'm sorry I got so nervous when you called
out to me. I thought maybe you were going to
give me some feng shui advice...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
There's really nothing shady about feng shui,
though. Still, that stuff can wait until next time!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I actually learned how to run like that from my
trainer!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
My trainer gave me clear advice and helped me
actually put it into practice. That's why I was able
to give you those tips.

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Are you sure it's all right for you to share
such an important technique with me?!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'm sure. I want to pass on what I learn.
That'll make everyone happy, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Besides, by going over what I learned with you, I
can review what my trainer taught me!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Hey, I'm suddenly in the mood for a good
run! Why don't we go together?
